name: Country Fried Corn with Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crisp. Drain on paper towels and pour off all but 2 tablespoons of fat.
2. Cut the bacon into small strips or crumble it and set aside.
3. Add the onion to the remaining fat in the skillet and fry until it softens.
4. Husk the corn, remove the kernels from the ears and scrape the cobs to retrieve all the milk.
5. Add the corn with its milk to the onions in the skillet.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add the reserved bacon, season with salt and pepper as desired, and serve.
